# pdnd_clients (Data Source)

Lists PDND clients with optional name and consumer ID filters.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pdnd_clients" "all" {}

data "pdnd_clients" "by_name" {
  name = "My Client"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `consumer_id` (String) Filter by consumer UUID
- `name` (String) Filter by client name

### Read-Only

- `clients` (Attributes List) List of clients (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--clients))

<a id="nestedatt--clients"></a>
### Nested Schema for `clients`

Read-Only:

- `consumer_id` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
